title: Starter Board
preheader: A first compiled weekly roundup built from current Port Royal Sounder data sources.
intro: This early version of Weekly Specials pulls together regular market stops, prepared-food favorites, and recurring places worth checking this week. For now it is curated manually from the site directory; later we can automate the refresh.

items.name: Port Royal Farmers Market
items.note: Reliable Saturday stop for produce, seafood, meat, cheese, flowers, honey, and bread at Naval Heritage Park.

items.name: Downtown Beaufort Farmers' Market
items.note: Good recurring pick for local produce and prepared foods right in the middle of downtown Beaufort.

items.name: Farmers' Market of Bluffton
items.note: Weekly Bluffton market with farms, specialty vendors, prepared foods, and a strong local-maker mix.

items.name: The Kitchen
items.note: A strong pick for grab-and-go meals, baked goods, coffee, catering, and pantry extras.

items.name: Lowcountry Produce Market & Cafe - Beaufort
items.note: Downtown go-to for breakfast and lunch plus bakery items, pantry goods, and prepared foods.

items.name: Butcher's Market & Deli
items.note: Worth checking this week for steaks, house-made sausage, deli picks, and easy take-home meals.

items.name: Time To Eat
items.note: A good weekly watch for burgers, cheesesteaks, seafood, and rotating specials around Beaufort pop-ups.

items.name: Lowco Grub
items.note: Often worth checking for comfort-food plates and brewery pop-ups around Bluffton.

items.name: Palmetto Pops
items.note: Seasonal frozen-treat option that shows up at family-friendly markets and events.

items.name: Shellring Ale Works
items.note: One of the easiest recurring music checks in Port Royal, especially if you want a casual beer-garden setting.

items.name: Port Royal Street Music
items.note: Seasonal street-series pick to keep on the radar for a walkable outdoor music night in town.

items.name: USCB Center for the Arts
items.note: Best weekly watch for ticketed concerts, touring performances, and more formal arts programming.
